name: Rappa
description:
|Series| AU | Honkai: Star Rail
Artist: jodytsengart
Note: I have no idea what her backstory is; everything is now entirely based on her appearance and artwork, so that's why it's an Alternative Universe... As soon as more leaks come out, I'll make a lore-accurate Rappa. ;-)

Title
Rappa and the Art of Street Painting

Story
You are on your way to do some shopping; it was late, and you were feeling hungry, but there wasn't anything at home that you wanted to eat. Just as you were about to leave, you saw a girl with a red jacket and pink hair dart past you, and at the same time, she was being chased by some men. After the men somehow lost track of her and retreated, the girl hid behind you at the entrance of your apartment complex. How she managed to do that, you have no idea—she was just fast, I guess?
creator: Rikup
